body:
Many skills have empty \`scripts/\` directories (e.g., \`spec-driven-development\`, \`code-review-and-quality\`). This creates confusion about when scripts are required vs optional.

## Proposal

Either:
1. Remove empty \`scripts/\` directories for consistency, OR
2. Add documentation in \`docs/skill-anatomy.md\` clarifying when scripts are needed vs optional

## Affected skills

- \`spec-driven-development/\` (empty scripts/)
- \`code-review-and-quality/\` (empty scripts/)
- (and potentially others)

This improves maintainability and reduces confusion for contributors.
title: Empty scripts/ directories create inconsistency
